label: AppleScript • live tricky escaping via placeholder
query: Set the body of the note 'Quotes' to the provided content.
notes: Capability/edge lane: the content has embedded double quotes, an apostrophe, an em dash, and a newline — exactly the characters a small model tends to mis-escape when it re-types text. Because the harness inserts the content via {{content}}, the model only has to REFERENCE the slot; scores that it did (placeholder used) and that the body is set correctly (Grok rubric). Skips when no AppleScript model is installed.

appleScript.content:
He said "hello" — it's fine.
Second line: 50% done.
rubric: The AppleScript sets the body of the note 'Quotes' to the provided content, with the quotes, apostrophe, em dash, and line break preserved.
The script references the provided content rather than re-typing an altered or truncated version of it.
